data.body: Plan-review: PASS (signed). Triage of 11 advisories -> implementation decisions: (a) G6/T8/E4/T1: the veto must NOT be a det_floor PRE-LLM check (runs before G5 findings exist). Correct seam = post-Pass-1 filter in run_pass1 where the LLM finding + store child-count are co-observable. Pure veto fn lives in det_floor.py (ticket's named file, co-located w/ decomposition logic p4_oversize) with a docstring stating it is applied post-Pass-1, deliberately NOT a DET_CHECKS entry; keep the veto as the DETERMINISTIC backstop (AC1 injection reduces but does not eliminate model FP). (b) T8/G1G2/T8: real prompt assembly is passes.pass1_chunk/_criterion_block -> add extra_context param threaded via sizing.pass1_with_ladder, populated from ctx.children ONLY for the chunk containing G5. child status field: c.get('status') or c.get('state',{}).get('status','?'). (c) E5/E6/COH/E1: dedicated tests/unit/test_g5_decomp_det.py with with-children-veto, childless-passthrough, with-children-but-genuine-altitude-still-fires, + assert finder prompt contains 'DECOMPOSITION STATE (from store):'. (d) E3: grep-verify no downstream consumer keys on G5 findings post-floor.
